# llms.txt - AI discovery for MirPDF
# https://llmstxt.org/
# Site: https://mirpdf.com

## About
MirPDF is a privacy-first online PDF toolkit. Most processing happens in the browser (client-side) to minimize file upload risk.

## Popular tools (Turkish URLs)
- PDF Birleştir: https://mirpdf.com/pdf-birlestir
- PDF Sıkıştır: https://mirpdf.com/pdf-sikistir
- PDF Böl: https://mirpdf.com/pdf-bol
- PDF → JPG: https://mirpdf.com/pdf-to-jpg
- JPG → PDF: https://mirpdf.com/jpg-to-pdf
- PDF Döndür: https://mirpdf.com/pdf-dondur
- Sayfa Sil: https://mirpdf.com/sayfa-sil
- Sayfa Sırala: https://mirpdf.com/sayfa-sirala

## Pricing
- Free tier: limited daily credits
- Pro tier: higher limits via subscription (see https://mirpdf.com/pricing.html)

## Privacy & security
- Client-side processing is preferred where possible.
- Some features may require server-side components in the future.

## Sitemap
https://mirpdf.com/sitemap.xml

## Last Updated
2026-02-20
